name: voicesign
summary: VoiceSign - cryptographically sign voice recordings with inaudible spread-spectrum watermarks tied to your identity. Ed25519 crypto, sync markers, codec-resilient. Includes hosted-registry publish() that returns a public verification permalink (oravys.com/s/<id>) and an audiogram MP4. Source-available under BUSL-1.1; auto-converts to Apache-2.0 on 2029-05-11. Part of the Oravys Operating System.
